artifacts.summary: Deep analysis of Option C (CanonicalQuot Domain Transfer) with complete step-by-step strategy

next_steps: Run /plan 982 to create implementation plan based on the two-stage validity approach

key_findings: Option C (CanonicalQuot) is the mathematically cleanest path
CanonicalMCS has PROVEN forward_F/backward_P (no sorries) because ALL MCS are in the domain
TimelineQuot sorries exist because staged construction witnesses may escape the timeline
The parametric truth lemma may work with Preorder (not requiring LinearOrder)
AddCommGroup can be transferred via Cantor isomorphism from Q to any countable dense linear order
Two-stage validity approach: prove BFMCS completeness, then connect to TaskFrame validity
The CanonicalReachable dead end was superseded by canonicalMCSBFMCS - this IS Option C
Modal saturation may require multi-family BFMCS construction
metadata.recommended_path: Use CanonicalMCS BFMCS for truth lemma (forward_F/backward_P proven), then connect to TaskFrame validity via TimelineQuot embedding
